new fear, someone hits irony style mid interview and amelia doesnt get it
ameli realized that old school and modern are not accurate descriptors of what she means when she talks about the feel of fangames and we spent the rest of the stream trying to find and alternative
some suggestions were "traditional vs. contemporary", "unsafe vs. safe", and "i dont like it vs. i like it"
we never concluded what was the most accurate

straight up like when they draw a cheese with a cage trap above it
